title: Hungry Jack's Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: Hungry Jack's Pty Ltd paid $150,240 after the ACCC issued eight infringement notices over a button-battery-powered Garfield toy, supplied nationwide with children's meals (27,850 units), that lacked the warnings required under the mandatory information standard for button batteries. Hungry Jack's also gave the ACCC a court-enforceable undertaking admitting the likely breach and committing to implement a compliance program.
scope: Paid $150,240 over eight ACCC infringement notices for a children's product lacking mandatory button-battery warnings; Gave a court-enforceable undertaking admitting the likely breach
